subject: A hooded cultist in dark robes channels a violent burst of green-yellow energy from outstretched hands, head bowed, the chaotic light fracturing the darkness around them
description: A robed figure stands centered in deep shadow, head bowed beneath a heavy cowl that fully obscures the face. Both arms are raised and angled inward, hands acting as the focal point of a violent eruption of sickly green-yellow energy that lashes outward in jagged tendrils and crackling arcs. The light fractures the surrounding blackness into smoky, vaporous shapes — suggestion of writhing forms or torn cloth caught in the discharge. The robes themselves are heavy, dark, with hints of greenish reflected light along the folds. The composition is symmetrical and ritualistic, with the energy reading as something being torn out of, or forced into, the figure. No visible architecture, no horizon — pure occult interior space.
foreground: hooded robed figure with hands raised channeling crackling green-yellow energy
background: void of black smoke and shadow lit only by the spell's discharge
emotion: head bowed in concentration or anguish; body taut with the strain of channeling something violent
